name: ASUS PRIME B760M-A-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - DisplayPort 1.4 - 2x HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASUS PRIME B760M-A-CSM Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Budget-friendly Intel Micro-ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket and DDR5 support for mainstream builds.

specs.pcie_slots: 1x PCIe 4.0 x16, 1x PCIe 4.0 x4, 1x PCIe 4.0 x1
